issues.description: First action should be a condition/cost (resting own Minks character), not a primary action. DSL structure does not support optional costs; this should be clarified in implementation or restructured.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard action has no basis in card text. Card text contains no draw effect.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is invalid. Should use standard targeting syntax; verify scope name against official DSL spec.
